install_fields.label: Personal Auth Token
install_fields.help: Your Bugsnag Personal Auth Token. Find it at Settings → My account → Personal auth token.

install_fields.label: Organization Slug
install_fields.help: The slug of your Bugsnag organization. Find it in the URL after /organizations/ or in Settings → Organization.

description: Syncs Bugsnag projects, errors (crash reports), and releases into the Shielva knowledge base for AI-powered error analysis and incident response.
